title: Sparse Structures Reforged
description: Makes all structures more spread out (essentially making them rarer) and make exploration more challenging/less repetitive.
body: # ⚠ Deprecated ## The official mod now supports Forge, with latest features, you can find it here. ### SSR This is an unofficial 1.16.5+ Forge port of [Sparse Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/sparsestructures) Modded structures will be affected too. ### FAQ Q: What's the difference between spacing and separation? (in 1.16-1.19 mod config) A: Separation is minimum dist in chunks, spacing is average dist in chunks. In addition, the value of spacing must be greater than separation, otherwise the game will crash. ### Misc Join Our discord: https://discord.gg/g8q3UHTpCP! [![image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/75401fe6-76e7-471c-89e5-1edd37a950ad.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasualix)
